zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Brian Stapleton於1379年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Sir Miles Stapleton III27歲，母親Ela Ufford17歲。他和Cecily Bardolph至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1438年8月17日在英國諾福爾可英厄姆享年59歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可英厄姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Brian Stapleton于1379年出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Sir Miles Stapleton III27岁，母亲Ela Ufford17岁。他和Cecily Bardolph至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1438年8月17日在英国諾福爾可英厄姆享年59岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可英厄姆。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Brian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Irish origin: perhaps from an Old Celtic word meaning ‘high’ or ‘noble’. The name has been perennially popular in Ireland, in particular on account of the fame of Brian Boru (Gaelic Brian Bóroimhe) ( c. 940–1014 ), a warrior who was credited with driving the Vikings from Ireland and who eventually became high king of Ireland. In the Middle Ages it was relatively common in East Anglia, where it was introduced by Breton settlers, and in northern England, where it was introduced by Scandinavians from Ireland. It was quite popular in Yorkshire in the early 16th century, largely because it had long been a family name among the Stapletons, who had Irish connections. They first used it after Sir Gilbert Stapleton married Agnes , the daughter of the great northern baron Sir Brian fitzAlan . In Gaelic Scotland it was at first borne exclusively by members of certain professional families of Irish origin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: Variant of   Brian  , influenced by the usual spelling of the associated surname.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Brian Stapleton was born in 1379, in Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Miles Stapleton III, was 27 and his mother, Ela Ufford, was 17. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Cecily Bardolph. He registered for military service in 1415. He died on 17 August 1438, in Ingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Ingham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Brian Stapleton est né en 1379, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Miles Stapleton III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ela Ufford, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Cecily Bardolph. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé le 17 août 1438, à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Brian Stapleton 1379 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Miles Stapleton III 27 und seine Mutter Ela Ufford 17. Er hatte mit Cecily Bardolph mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 17. August 1438 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Ingham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Ingham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Brian Stapleton è nato il nel 1379 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Miles Stapleton III, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Ela Ufford, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Cecily Bardolph. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì il 17 agosto 1438, nel Ingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Ingham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Brian Stapletonが1379年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir Miles Stapleton IIIは27歳，母Ela Uffordは17歳であった。彼はCecily Bardolphとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1438年8月17日にイギリスノーフォルクインガムで59歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Brian Stapleton(이)가 1379년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Miles Stapleton III(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela Ufford(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Cecily Bardolph(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1438년 8월 17일 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Brian Stapleton nasceu em 1379, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Miles Stapleton III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ela Ufford, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Cecily Bardolph. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1438, em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Brian Stapleton родился в 1379 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Miles Stapleton III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela Ufford, 17. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Cecily Bardolph. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 17 августа 1438 г. в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Brian Stapleton nació en 1379, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Miles Stapleton III, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ela Ufford, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Cecily Bardolph. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1438, en Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
